---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for DYDYD
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## User Story

As a [type of user], I want [goal] so that [benefit].

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you are proposing.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Priority

- [ ] Critical -- blocks core functionality
- [ ] High -- important for upcoming milestone
- [ ] Medium -- valuable improvement
- [ ] Low -- nice to have

## Proposed Implementation

If you have ideas about how this could be implemented, describe them here. Include any relevant technical details, affected files, or architecture considerations.

## Workspace Affected

- [ ] Backend (`@dydyd/backend`)
- [ ] Mobile (`@dydyd/mobile`)
- [ ] Shared (`@dydyd/shared`)
- [ ] CI/Infrastructure

## Mockups / References

If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or links to similar features in other apps.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the feature request here. Reference related issues or PRs if applicable.
